title: Senior Full-Stack AI Engineer
description:
What You'll Do:
Lead architecture and design decisions for end-to-end solutions spanning backend, frontend, data pipelines, and AI/ML models.
Develop production-grade applications, including full-stack and CRM solutions, that transform data into actionable insights for enterprise users.
Design, build, and maintain scalable cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines to support reliable, high-performance deployments.
Collaborate closely with client teams, from engineers to executives, to deeply understand business challenges and deliver tailored solutions.
Integrate and fine-tune LLMs and GenAI tools including API orchestration, prompt engineering, and adversarial testing to improve model accuracy and reliability.
Partner with internal teams to ensure seamless solution delivery and contribute reusable frameworks and best practices.
What We're Looking For:
Strong full-stack software engineering skills across backend, frontend, and system integration. Proficiency in Python, SQL, Java/Scala, JavaScript/TypeScript, and modern frameworks (React, FastAPI, Flask, Next.js).
Experience designing, building, and deploying production applications with data and AI/ML components.
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS — ECS, Fargate, Lambda, S3, Snowflake, Airflow) and infrastructure tooling (Terraform, Docker).
Proficiency with CI/CD tools and DevOps practices including CircleCI, GitHub Actions, and monorepo architecture.
Experience integrating and working with LLMs and GenAI frameworks including LangChain, GraphRAG, OpenAI API, and similar tools.
Familiarity with adversarial testing, red-teaming, and prompt fine-tuning to improve model performance and security.
Proven ability to deliver technical solutions that drive measurable outcomes for enterprise clients.
Excellent communication skills and ability to engage with diverse stakeholders.
Curiosity, adaptability, and a passion for learning new technologies.

title: .NET Developer
description:
This role is ideal for a hands-on .NET Web Developer who enjoys working across the full software development lifecycle and contributing to business-critical systems. You will join a collaborative development team responsible for building, enhancing, and supporting high-traffic ecommerce and internal applications that directly impact the business.
What You Will Do
Design, develop, test, and maintain applications using C#, .NET, SQL. Entity Framework and SQL
Execute full lifecycle software development from requirements through deployment
Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to assess technical feasibility and system design
Integrate software components into scalable, fully functional systems
Develop and execute software verification and quality assurance procedures
Create and maintain technical documentation including specifications and workflows
Serve as a technical resource and mentor for other developers
Recommend improvements to tools, processes, and development standards
Stay current with modern development tools and best practices
Required Qualifications
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or a related field
4 or more years of professional software development experience
Strong hands-on experience with C# and .NET
Solid understanding of object-oriented programming principles
Experience working with relational databases and SQL Server
Experience with full software development lifecycle methodologies
Must be legally authorized to work in the United States without sponsorship
Nice to Have
Experience with front-end technologies such as React, Angular, Vue, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, or jQuery
Exposure to Unix or Linux environments
Experience supporting or modernizing legacy systems Knowledge of data communications or socket-based integrations
